description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in odCMS 1.06, and possibly earlier, allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the Page parameter to (1) _main/index.php, (2) _members/index.php, (3) _forum/index.php, (4) _docs/index.php, and (5) _announcements/index.php.
